title: hopea ferrea
intro: Hopea ferrea, also known as ironwood or iron tree, is a species of plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae. It is a large tree native to Southeast Asia, known for its dense and heavy timber. The Hopea ferrea tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The bark and leaves of the tree can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting digestive health.
